_comment_constitution: All hook patterns derive from constitution.md YAML front-matter. Hook scripts parse it at runtime — never hardcode patterns inside scripts.
_comment_test_first: Smoke-test every hook against the fixtures in HOOKS_SMOKE_TEST_FIXTURES.md before merging. A hook that exits 1 instead of 2 silently fails to enforce.

Stop._comment: Belt-and-suspenders: re-run all four Sacred Rule checks at session stop. Catches anything that slipped past PreToolUse (e.g., a multi-edit that touched files in a single tool call).

SessionStart._comment: Inject constitution.md location and Sacred Rule status into session context. Helps Claude understand the enforcement layer exists.

hooks.command: echo '{"additionalContext": "Constitution.md is the canonical source of Sacred Rules. Four PreToolUse hooks in .claude/hooks/ enforce SR-1 through SR-4 deterministically. Bypass via [bypass] commit tag for trivial changes only (≤20 lines, no behavior change, no Sacred Rule surface)."}'
